concerns.text: FR-005 mandates 'Wilcoxon Signed-Rank tests'. The tasks (T027) and plan implement 'Linear Mixed-Effects Models (LMM)' instead. While the plan justifies this methodologically, there is NO task explicitly addressing the requirement change or the removal of the Wilcoxon test implementation. The spec requires a specific test; the tasks implement a different one without a traceable task to update the spec or formally document the deviation in the implementation artifacts.

FR-008 strictly defines propensity score matching covariates as 'initial cyclomatic complexity and project size (LOC)'. Task T015 implements matching using 'block-level metrics and repo-level covariates (stars, age)'. There is no task covering the addition of these extra covariates or a task to update FR-008 to reflect the expanded matching criteria. The implementation deviates from the signed-off requirement without a corresponding task to manage that change.

SC-006 requires the classifier's precision and recall on the ground-truth subset to be '≥ 0.85'. While T029 performs a sensitivity analysis using misclassification rates, there is no specific task to calculate the precision/recall metrics and verify they meet the ≥ 0.85 threshold, nor a task to report this specific metric as a success criterion. The task covers the analysis but not the specific validation of the success criterion.
